content:textarea:2:74.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:74.html: The Salvation Army needs several employees for short-term seasonal employment as part of our Christmas assistance team. Our Angel Tree program will run from Oct. 2 to Dec. 22 and will require several full-time employees to fill these temporary roles. Salaries range from $15-$17 per hour. Last year we provided Christmas assistance to over 3,500 children and 1,200 seniors in the Charlotte community. If you have a passion for serving others and enjoy the hustle and bustle of Christmas, please apply below for consideration. Interviews will be conducted the week of September 9th and 15th. NOTE: these roles are full-time roles with daily hours from 8:30 – 4:30 and some Saturday and evening work required.

Last year we provided Christmas assistance to over 3,500 children and 1,200 seniors in the Charlotte community. If you have a passion for serving others and enjoy the hustle and bustle of Christmas, please apply below for consideration. Interviews will be conducted the week of September 9th and 15th. NOTE: these roles are full-time roles with daily hours from 8:30 – 4:30 and some Saturday and evening work required.

content:wysiwyg_basic:5:81.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:5:81.html:
Christmas Center Senior Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Must have strong leadership, management, and organizational skills
  • Excellent communication and problem-solving abilities
  • Proficient in Word, Excel, and database programs
  • Ability to handle stress and manage multiple tasks
  • Supervises staff in the absence of the Christmas Services Manager
  • Assists with daily operations, client registration, and other assigned tasks

Bi-Lingual Communication Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Must be fluent in Spanish and English
  • Provides translation support and communication with Hispanic clients
  • Assists with volunteer coordination and registration tasks

Volunteer Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Outgoing personality; comfortable speaking to large groups
  • Strong communication and organizational skills
  • Proficient in online database programs
  • Responsible for scheduling, training, and supervising volunteers
  • Supports client registration and additional seasonal tasks

Warehouse Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Maintains cleanliness, organization, and inventory of the Christmas Center
  • Manages deliveries, recycling, and overall facility upkeep
  • Supports traffic flow and parking during registration and distribution

Donor / Special Handling Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Strong computer and organizational skills, must have strong excel skills
  • Manages donor communication and Angel Tree assignments
  • Coordinates preparation and pick-up of Angel orders
  • Oversees check-in and placement of special handling items
  • Supports client registration as needed

Toyland Coordinator (Full Season)

  • Manages toy inventory and setup of Toyland area
  • Organizes toy donations and tracks in-kind contributions
  • Oversees volunteers working in Toyland and supports client registration
